_note: Canonicalize tagged character names -> canonical (registry) names. Applied at build time so raw scene tags are preserved. Fixes reader-invented surnames and strips pathway-name / honorific prefixes. Add entries as review surfaces more.
_exclude_note: Not people — dropped from casts/needs-image list (animals, objects mistagged as characters).
_verified_present_note: Tags the verifier flags as 'wrong scene' (name not in those exact lines) but a human confirmed the character IS present — named in an adjacent scene or by relation/description. Suppressed so verify only surfaces NEW issues.

verified_present.name: Count Hall
verified_present.why: present as 'her father' (Audrey takes his arm, L161)

verified_present.name: Rozanne
verified_present.why: present as 'the brown-haired girl'; names herself in s2 (L63)
